mapper.select: /* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderPoPlanReqLeft */ WITH COM_T AS ( SELECT COMDTKEY, COMDTNM, DTKEYORD FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND COMHDKEY = 'POSTATUS' AND LAKEY = 'KOR' AND DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT C.COMDTKEY AS REQORDERSTATUS, C.COMDTNM AS REQORDERSTATUSNM, COALESCE(T.SKU_CNT, 0) AS SKU, C.DTKEYORD FROM COM_T C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RE.REQORDERSTATUS, COUNT(DISTINCT RE.ICKEY) AS SKU_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RE JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON IC.OWKEY = RE.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RE.ICKEY WHERE RE.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND RE.CTKEY = #{CTKEY} AND RE.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AND RE.URGENCYREQORDERYN = 'N' AND RE.REQORDERSTATUS IN ('00','01','02','03') -- 임시/요청/확정/취소 AND IC.POABLEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY RE.REQORDERSTATUS ) T ON C.COMDTKEY = T.REQORDERSTATUS ORDER BY C.DTKEYORD

/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderPoPlanReqRight */ SELECT X.REQCTKEY, X.CTNM, COUNT(*) AS SKU, TRUNC(SUM(COALESCE(X.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(X.EAUT, 0), 0)), 2) AS REQORDERQTY, TRUNC(SUM(COALESCE(X.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(X.INNUT, 0), 0)), 2) AS REQORDERINN, TRUNC(SUM(COALESCE(X.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(X.CTNUT, 0), 0)), 2) AS REQORDERCTN, TRUNC( SUM( COALESCE(X.REQORDERQTY / (NULLIF(X.CTNUT, 0)* NULLIF(COALESCE(X.CPP, 1), 0)), 0) ),2 ) AS REQORDERPLT , SUM( COALESCE(X.VOL * (X.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(X.INNUT, 0) ), 0)) AS VOL, SUM(COALESCE(X.SLPRC * X.REQORDERQTY, 0)) AS SLPRC FROM ( SELECT RO.OWKEY , RO.CTKEY , RO.ICKEY , RO.REQCTKEY , CT.CTNM , RO.REQORDERQTY , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICT.ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' THEN ICT.ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS EAUT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICT.ICUNITTYPE = 'INN' THEN ICT.ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS INNUT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICT.ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN ICT.ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS CTNUT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICT.ICUNITTYPE = 'INN' THEN ICT.VOL END), 0) AS VOL , COALESCE(MAX(B2BCPP.CPP), 1) AS CPP , MAX(COALESCE(IC.SLPRC, 0)) AS SLPRC FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RO INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON RO.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND RO.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = RO.REQCTKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICT ON RO.ICKEY = ICT.ICKEY AND RO.OWKEY = ICT.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXB2BCPP B2BCPP ON B2BCPP.ICKEY = RO.ICKEY AND B2BCPP.CTKEY = RO.REQCTKEY WHERE RO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND RO.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND RO.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AND RO.REQORDERTYPE ='03' AND RO.URGENCYREQORDERYN ='N' AND RO.REQORDERSTATUS = #{reqorderstatus} GROUP BY RO.OWKEY, RO.CTKEY, RO.ICKEY, RO.REQCTKEY,CT.CTNM ,RO.REQORDERQTY ) X GROUP BY X.REQCTKEY , X.CTNM ORDER BY X.REQCTKEY

/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - checkCtIvQty */ SELECT SUM(CTAVQTY) FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(AVQTY, 0) + CASE WHEN IBEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS CTAVQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER WHERE CTKEY = #{reqctkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CTAVQTY )
/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectReqOrderNo */ SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || LPAD(#{index}::TEXT, 3, '0')
/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - getReqOrderExcelSeq */ SELECT nextval('seq_torder_upload_reqorder')

/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectReqOrderExcelTempList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLDKEY , UPLDSEQ , OLNCTKEY AS CTKEY , OFLNCTKEY AS REQCTKEY , ICKEY , REQORDERQTY , CTIVRFLCTNEEDQTY , ERRCD , ERRCMTS , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_REQORDER WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N'
/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectReqOrderExcelTempSucCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_REQORDER WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ERRCD IS NULL AND ERRCMTS IS NULL
/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectExcelErrorCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_REQORDER WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ERRCD IS NOT NULL AND ERRCMTS IS NOT NULL

/* oms-po-poPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectReqOrderExcelError */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , '' AS OWKEY , A.UPLDKEY , A.UPLDSEQ , A.OLNCTKEY , A.OFLNCTKEY , A.ICKEY , A.REQORDERQTY , A.CTIVRFLCTNEEDQTY , A.DELYN , A.ERRCD , A.ERRCMTS , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_REQORDER A WHERE A.UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ERRCD IS NOT NULL AND A.ERRCMTS IS NOT NULL #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_REQORDER ( OWKEY , CTKEY , REQORDERDAY , ICKEY , REQORDERTYPE , URGENCYREQORDERYN , SEQ , ICTGT , REQORDERAR , REQORDERNO , REQORDERSTATUS , ABLEREQORDERYN , UNICYN , AVGOBQTY , AVGOBFROMDAY , AVGOBTODAY , AVGAPLYDAYS , AVQTY , IBEXPCTQTY , REQCTKEY , CALAVDAYS , DLVYREQORDERUNIT , REQORDERQTY , CNFRMREQORDERQTY , AVDAYS , REQORDERUNIT , CTLEADTIME , UPLOADYN , RECALCYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT T.OWKEY , T.CTKEY , T.REQORDERDAY , T.ICKEY , T.REQORDERTYPE , T.URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(MAXSEQ, 0) + COALESCE(RANK, 0)AS SEQ , T.ICTGT , T.REQORDERAR , T.REQORDERNO , T.REQORDERSTATUS , T.ABLEREQORDERYN , T.UNICYN , T.AVGOBQTY , T.AVGOBFROMDAY , T.AVGOBTODAY , T.AVGAPLYDAYS , T.AVQTY , T.IBEXPCTQTY , T.REQCTKEY , T.CALAVDAYS , T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT , T.REQORDERQTY , T.CNFRMREQORDERQTY , T.AVDAYS , T.REQORDERUNIT , T.CTLEADTIME , 'Y' AS UPLOADYN , 'N' AS RECALCYN , T.INSERTDATE , T.INSERTURKEY , T.UPDATEDATE , T.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , A.OLNCTKEY AS CTKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REQORDERDAY , A.ICKEY AS ICKEY , '03' AS REQORDERTYPE , 'N' AS URGENCYREQORDERYN , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.OLNCTKEY, A.ICKEY ORDER BY A.ICKEY) RANK , LC.LCKEY AS ICTGT , CASE WHEN A.OFLNCTKEY = '01' THEN LC.NAMSAB2BPOCTG WHEN A.OFLNCTKEY = '04' THEN LC.BUSANB2BPOCTG WHEN A.OFLNCTKEY = '05' THEN LC.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG ELSE NULL END REQORDERAR , NULL AS REQORDERNO , '00' AS REQORDERSTATUS , IC.POABLEYN AS ABLEREQORDERYN , IC.UNICYN , COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) AS AVGOBQTY , Q.OBFROMDAY AS AVGOBFROMDAY , Q.OBTODAY AS AVGOBTODAY , Q.APLYDAYS AS AVGAPLYDAYS , RIV.AVQTY AS AVQTY , B2C_IB.B2C_IB_QTY AS IBEXPCTQTY , A.OFLNCTKEY AS REQCTKEY , NULL AS CALAVDAYS , NULL AS DLVYREQORDERUNIT , A.REQORDERQTY , 0 AS CNFRMREQORDERQTY , NULL AS AVDAYS , NULL AS REQORDERUNIT , CT.CTLEADTIME , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY , A.ERRCD , A.ERRCMTS FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_REQORDER A LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RE ON A.OLNCTKEY = RE.CTKEY AND A.OFLNCTKEY = RE.REQCTKEY AND A.ICKEY = RE.ICKEY AND REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') AND RE.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT ICXCT ON ICXCT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNCTKEY = ICXCT.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = ICXCT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_LC LC ON A.OLNCTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND ICXCT.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON A.OLNCTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_REQORDER RO ON RO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNCTKEY = RO.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = RO.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT Z.OWKEY , Z.CTKEY , Z.GRPBASE AS ICKEY , SUM( Z.AVQTY) AS AVQTY FROM ( SELECT X.CTKEY , X.OWKEY , X.ICKEY , X.AVQTY , COALESCE(Y.ASRTREPKEY, X.ICKEY) GRPBASE FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDERIV X LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ASRT Y ON X.OWKEY = Y.OWKEY AND X.ICKEY = Y.ASRTKEY AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT Z WHERE Z.OWKEY = Y.OWKEY AND Z.ASRTREPKEY = Y.ASRTREPKEY AND Z.QTY > 0 ) ) Z GROUP BY Z.OWKEY , Z.CTKEY , Z.GRPBASE ) RIV ON A.OLNCTKEY = RIV.CTKEY AND RIV.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = RIV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY Q ON Q.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = Q.ICKEY AND A.OLNCTKEY = Q.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, SUM(COALESCE(EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS B2C_IB_QTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.POCALINCYN = 'Y' AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY )B2C_IB ON B2C_IB.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IC.ICKEY = B2C_IB.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_OBSTAT_AVG AV ON AV.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNCTKEY = AV.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = AV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER B2B_REQ ON A.OFLNCTKEY = B2B_REQ.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = B2B_REQ.ICKEY AND B2B_REQ.CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_B2BGRTDAYS GRTDAYS ON GRTDAYS.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNCTKEY = GRTDAYS.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = GRTDAYS.ICKEY AND A.ICKEY = GRTDAYS.ICKEY AND A.OFLNCTKEY = GRTDAYS.B2BCTKEY WHERE A.UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY, ICKEY, MAX(SEQ) AS MAXSEQ FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDER WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND REQORDERTYPE = '03' AND URGENCYREQORDERYN = 'N' AND REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY CTKEY, ICKEY ) R ON T.CTKEY = R.CTKEY AND T.ICKEY = R.ICKEY
WHERE T.ERRCD IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT A.ICKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_REQORDER B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = #{ctkey} LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER C ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND (REQORDERSTATUS IS NULL OR REQORDERSTATUS = '00') AND C.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY A.ICKEY
